perturbation.original_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k) under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned agree to the joint filing on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13G (including amendments thereto) with respect to the Common Stock of Spring Bank Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and further agree that this agreement be included as an exhibit to such filing.
perturbation.changed_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k) under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned agree to the joint filing on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13G (including amendments thereto) with respect to the Common Stock of Spring Bank Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and further agree that this agreement *may*, at the discretion of the filing parties, be included as an exhibit to such filing.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that the agreement 'will' be included as an exhibit. The modified text changes 'will' to 'may, at the discretion of the filing parties,' creating uncertainty as to whether the agreement is definitively included. This contradicts the implied mandatory nature of the agreement to be an exhibit, where one section makes the decision discretionary while the first agreement stated that it 'will' be included as an exhibit to such filing.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k) under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned agree to the joint filing on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13G (including amendments thereto) with respect to the Common Stock of Spring Bank Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and further agree that this agreement *may*, at the discretion of the filing parties, be included as an exhibit to such filing. Each party to the agreement expressly authorizes each other party to file on its behalf any and all amendments to such statement. Each party to this agreement agrees that this joint filing agreement may be signed in counterparts. In evidence whereof, the undersigned have caused this Agreement to be executed on their behalf this 7t h day of April, 2020. UBS ONCOLOGY IMPACT FUND L.P. ONCOLOGY IMPACT FUND (CAYMAN) MANAGEMENT L.P. By: Oncology Impact Fund (Cayman) Management L.P, By: MPM Oncology Impact Management LP, its General Partner its General Partner By: MPM Oncology Impact Management LP, By: MPM Oncology Impact Management GP LLC, its General Partner its General Partner By: MPM Oncology Impact Management GP LLC, By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke its General Partner Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member MPM ONCOLOGY IMPACT MANAGEMENT LP MPM ONCOLOGY IMPACT MANAGEMENT GP LLC By: MPM Oncology Impact Management GP LLC, By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke its General Partner Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates the inclusion of the agreement as an exhibit ('will be included'), while the changed text makes it discretionary ('may, at the discretion of the filing parties'). This directly contradicts the implied mandatory nature of the exhibit inclusion, creating a structural flaw as defined in the instructions. Both the changed text and the contradicted text exists in the same location, exacerbating the contradiction. The change introduces uncertainty where the original text provided certainty, creating a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Each party to the agreement expressly authorizes each other party to file on its behalf any and all amendments to such statement.
perturbation.changed_text: Each party to the agreement expressly authorizes each other party to file on its behalf some amendments to such statement. The determination of which amendments will be filed is at each parties sole discretion.
perturbation.explanation: The original text authorizes each party to file 'any and all' amendments. The modified text limits this authorization to 'some' amendments, with the determination of which amendments to file at each party's sole discretion. This directly contradicts the original unlimited authorization, and creates uncertainty about the extent of each party's power to file amendments where this is an in text contradiction
perturbation.location: Middle of agreement, after the first sentence.
perturbation.contradicted_location: Middle of agreement, after the first sentence.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k) under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned agree to the joint filing on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13G (including amendments thereto) with respect to the Common Stock of Spring Bank Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and further agree that this agreement *may*, at the discretion of the filing parties, be included as an exhibit to such filing. Each party to the agreement expressly authorizes each other party to file on its behalf some amendments to such statement. The determination of which amendments will be filed is at each parties sole discretion. Each party to this agreement agrees that this joint filing agreement may be signed in counterparts. In evidence whereof, the undersigned have caused this Agreement to be executed on their behalf this 7t h day of April, 2020. UBS ONCOLOGY IMPACT FUND L.P. ONCOLOGY IMPACT FUND (CAYMAN) MANAGEMENT L.P. By: Oncology Impact Fund (Cayman) Management L.P, By: MPM Oncology Impact Management LP, its General Partner its General Partner By: MPM Oncology Impact Management LP, By: MPM Oncology Impact Management GP LLC, its General Partner its General Partner By: MPM Oncology Impact Management GP LLC, By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke its General Partner Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member MPM ONCOLOGY IMPACT MANAGEMENT LP MPM ONCOLOGY IMPACT MANAGEMENT GP LLC By: MPM Oncology Impact Management GP LLC, By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke its General Partner Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member
perturbation.justification: The original text granted each party the authority to file 'any and all' amendments on behalf of the others. The changed text limits this authority to 'some' amendments, with each party having sole discretion over which amendments to file. This creates a direct contradiction, as the original unlimited authorization is now restricted. This contradicts the overall agreement because it creates uncertainty as to which party has control over which amendment. The contradicted text is the paragraph where the modification was made but the changed text is in direct contradiction with the original intent to authorize each other party on it's behalf as it relates to amendments.

perturbation.original_text: Each party to this agreement agrees that this joint filing agreement may be signed in counterparts.
perturbation.changed_text: Each party to this agreement agrees that this joint filing agreement may *not* be signed in counterparts.
perturbation.explanation: The original text says the agreement 'may be signed in counterparts.' The modified version says 'may not be signed in counterparts.' These statements are mutually exclusive, because it is creating uncertainty about the validity of the agreement if signed in counterparts since the first part of the agreement states it can be sign in counterparts but the modified clause says it cannot be signed in counterparts
perturbation.location: Middle of agreement, after the second sentence.
perturbation.contradicted_location: Middle of agreement, after the second sentence.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In accordance with Rule 13d-1(k) under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended, the undersigned agree to the joint filing on behalf of each of them of a statement on Schedule 13G (including amendments thereto) with respect to the Common Stock of Spring Bank Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and further agree that this agreement *may*, at the discretion of the filing parties, be included as an exhibit to such filing. Each party to the agreement expressly authorizes each other party to file on its behalf some amendments to such statement. The determination of which amendments will be filed is at each parties sole discretion. Each party to this agreement agrees that this joint filing agreement may *not* be signed in counterparts. In evidence whereof, the undersigned have caused this Agreement to be executed on their behalf this 7t h day of April, 2020. UBS ONCOLOGY IMPACT FUND L.P. ONCOLOGY IMPACT FUND (CAYMAN) MANAGEMENT L.P. By: Oncology Impact Fund (Cayman) Management L.P, By: MPM Oncology Impact Management LP, its General Partner its General Partner By: MPM Oncology Impact Management LP, By: MPM Oncology Impact Management GP LLC, its General Partner its General Partner By: MPM Oncology Impact Management GP LLC, By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke its General Partner Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member MPM ONCOLOGY IMPACT MANAGEMENT LP MPM ONCOLOGY IMPACT MANAGEMENT GP LLC By: MPM Oncology Impact Management GP LLC, By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke its General Partner Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member By: /s/ Ansbert Gadicke Name: Ansbert Gadicke Title: Managing Member
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text. The original text allowed for the agreement to be signed in counterparts, while the changed text explicitly states that it may *not* be signed in counterparts. This creates a clear and direct conflict with the same agreement being signed in counterparts, as allowed in the original clause found in the Contradicted Text.
